title: chrysanthemum potaninii
intro: Chrysanthemum potaninii, also known as the Chinese chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species native to China, which belongs to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, headaches, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against liver damage, among others. In traditional Chinese medicine, Chrysanthemum potaninii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
